steps.t: Frothard Took can be found in the Village of Tighfield. You should bring the map scraps to Frothard Took.
The location of the hidden treasure is in the woods east of the village of Gamwich. You should find the hidden treasure.
The location of the hidden treasure is in the woods east of the village of Gamwich. You should dig up the hidden treasure.
The location of the hidden treasure is in the woods east of the village of Gamwich. You should open the old coffer and remove the treasure inside.
Frothard Took can be found in the village of Tighfield. You should bring the golf clubs to Frothard Took.
